basic_details.job_title: IIIT Kota Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Information Technology Kota (IIIT Kota)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Information Technology Kota (IIIT Kota) Medical Officer Notification 2026 has been released on 19 May 2026 on the official website iiitkota.ac.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the IIIT Kota Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 for Medical Officer posts on a contract basis.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS Degree or equivalent qualification included in any one of the Schedules to the Indian Medical Council Act, 1956 (102 of 1956), Must be registered in a State Medical Register or the Indian Medical Register, Post Graduate qualification, preferably MD in general, or an equivalent qualification included in any one of the Schedules to the Indian Medical Council Act, 1956 (102 of 1956)
qualification.details: MBBS Degree or equivalent qualification included in any one of the Schedules to the Indian Medical Council Act, 1956 (102 of 1956). Must be registered in a State Medical Register or the Indian Medical Register. Desirable: Post Graduate qualification, preferably MD in general, or an equivalent qualification included in any one of the Schedules to the Indian Medical Council Act, 1956 (102 of 1956).

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for IIIT Kota Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The post name for the IIIT Kota Recruitment 2026 is Medical Officer. This is a contract-based position.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies available for the Medical Officer post in IIIT Kota Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly.

faq.question: Q4. What is the last date to apply for the Medical Officer position?
faq.answer: The last date for applying is the Walk-in Interview date, which is 25-05-2026. There is no online application process.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification required for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS Degree or equivalent qualification and be registered with the Indian Medical Council. A postgraduate qualification is desirable.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for the Medical Officer position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Medical Officer position is 70 years.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 56700 Per Month.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for IIIT Kota Medical Officer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Medical Officer role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Walk-In Interview followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the IIIT Kota located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Information Technology Kota is located in Kota, Rajasthan, with the pincode 325003.
